Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT INCOMM FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE

The unopposed application of Jane Metcalf for pro hac vice admission is denied, as the applicant has appeared pro hac vice in California ten times in the past two years and no special circumstances support the current application (CRC 9.40(b)).

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.
